articles.title: The Pentagon Wants Dual-Use Innovation. Patent Law Might Punish It.
articles.description: In 1918, the U.S. Supreme Court held that government contractors could be sued for patent infringement even if their products were manufactured specifically for the U.S. government. Franklin D. Roosevelt, then acting secretary of the Navy, wrote an urgent let…
